139:   async update(id: string, dto: UpdatePoDto): Promise<PurchaseOrder> {
140:     const po = await this.findById(id);
141:     if (po.status === PoStatus.CANCELLED || po.status === PoStatus.CLOSED) {
142:       throw new BadRequestException('Cannot update a cancelled or closed PO');
143:     }
144:     if (dto.expectedDeliveryDate !== undefined) po.expectedDeliveryDate = dto.expectedDeliveryDate;
145:     if (dto.notes !== undefined) po.notes = dto.notes;
146:     await this.poRepo.save(po);
147:     return this.findById(id);
148:   }
149: 
150:   async issue(
151:     id: string,
152:     userId: string,
153:     override?: BudgetOverrideContext,
154:   ): Promise<PurchaseOrder> {
155:     await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
156:       const po = await manager.findOne(PurchaseOrder, { where: { id } });
157:       if (!po) throw new NotFoundException('Purchase order not found');
158:       if (po.status !== PoStatus.DRAFT) {
159:         throw new BadRequestException('Only DRAFT purchase orders can be issued');
160:       }
161: 
162:       // ΓöÇΓöÇ Budget cap enforcement ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
163:       if (po.supplierId) {
164:         const budget = await this.budgetService.checkAndEnforce(
165:           manager,
166:           po.supplierId,
167:           Number(po.totalAmount),
168:         );
169: 
170:         if (!budget.allowed) {
171:           if (!override?.authorized) {
172:             throw new BadRequestException(
173:               `Budget cap exceeded for this supplier. ` +
174:                 `Cap: $${budget.cap?.toFixed(2)}, ` +
175:                 `Committed: $${budget.committed.toFixed(2)}, ` +
176:                 `Available: $${budget.available?.toFixed(2)}, ` +
177:                 `Required: $${Number(po.totalAmount).toFixed(2)}. ` +
178:                 `An ADMINISTRATOR override with a reason is required to proceed.`,
179:             );
180:           }
181: 
182:           if (override.role !== Role.ADMINISTRATOR) {
183:             throw new ForbiddenException(
184:               'Budget cap override requires ADMINISTRATOR role',
185:             );
186:           }
187: 
188:           await this.budgetService.recordOverride(
189:             manager,
190:             po.id,
191:             po.supplierId,
192:             userId,
193:             Number(po.totalAmount),
194:             budget.available ?? 0,
195:             override.reason,
196:           );
197:         }
198:       }
199:       // ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
200: 
201:       po.status = PoStatus.ISSUED;
202:       po.issuedAt = new Date();
203:       await manager.save(po);
204: 
205:       await this.auditService.log(userId, AuditAction.PO_ISSUED, 'PurchaseOrder', po.id, {
206:         poNumber: po.poNumber,
207:         issuedAt: po.issuedAt,
208:       });
209: 
210:       if (po.createdBy) {
211:         await this.notificationService.emit(
212:           po.createdBy,
213:           NotificationType.PO_ISSUED,
214:           'Purchase Order Issued',
215:           `Purchase order ${po.poNumber} has been issued to the supplier.`,
216:           { type: 'PurchaseOrder', id: po.id },
217:         );
218:       }
219:     });
220:     return this.findById(id);
221:   }
222: 
223:   async cancel(id: string, userId: string): Promise<PurchaseOrder> {
224:     await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
225:       const po = await manager.findOne(PurchaseOrder, { where: { id } });
226:       if (!po) throw new NotFoundException('Purchase order not found');
227:       if (!CANCELLABLE_STATUSES.includes(po.status)) {
228:         throw new BadRequestException(
229:           `Cannot cancel a PO with status ${po.status}`,
230:         );
231:       }
232: 
233:       po.status = PoStatus.CANCELLED;
234:       await manager.save(po);
235: 
236:       await this.auditService.log(userId, AuditAction.PO_CANCELLED, 'PurchaseOrder', po.id, {
237:         poNumber: po.poNumber,
238:         previousStatus: po.status,
239:       });
240:     });
241:     return this.findById(id);
242:   }
243: 
244:   // Used by the receiving module (Prompt 7) to update status
245:   async updateStatusAfterReceiving(
246:     id: string,
247:     userId: string,
248:     status: PoStatus.PARTIALLY_RECEIVED | PoStatus.FULLY_RECEIVED,
249:   ): Promise<void> {
250:     await this.poRepo.update(id, { status });
251:     await this.auditService.log(userId, AuditAction.PO_STATUS_CHANGED, 'PurchaseOrder', id, {
252:       newStatus: status,
253:     });
254:   }
255: 
256:   // Supplier portal ΓÇö only POs belonging to the supplier
257:   async findForSupplier(supplierId: string, query: QueryPosDto) {
258:     const page = parseInt(query.page || '1', 10);
259:     const limit = Math.min(parseInt(query.limit || '20', 10), 50);
260:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
261: 
262:     const visibleStatuses = [
263:       PoStatus.ISSUED,
264:       PoStatus.PARTIALLY_RECEIVED,
265:       PoStatus.FULLY_RECEIVED,
266:       PoStatus.CLOSED,
267:     ];
268: 
269:     const qb = this.poRepo
270:       .createQueryBuilder('po')
271:       .leftJoinAndSelect('po.lineItems', 'lineItems')
272:       .leftJoinAndSelect('po.supplier', 'supplier')
273:       .where('po.supplierId = :supplierId', { supplierId })
274:       .andWhere('po.status IN (:...statuses)', { statuses: visibleStatuses })
275:       .orderBy('po.createdAt', 'DESC')
276:       .skip(skip)
277:       .take(limit);
278: 
279:     if (query.status && visibleStatuses.includes(query.status as PoStatus)) {
280:       qb.andWhere('po.status = :status', { status: query.status });
281:     }
282: 
283:     const [data, total] = await qb.getManyAndCount();
284:     return { data, meta: { page, limit, total, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit) } };
285:   }
286: 
287:   async findByIdForSupplier(id: string, supplierId: string): Promise<PurchaseOrder> {
288:     const visibleStatuses = [
289:       PoStatus.ISSUED,
290:       PoStatus.PARTIALLY_RECEIVED,
291:       PoStatus.FULLY_RECEIVED,
292:       PoStatus.CLOSED,
293:     ];
294: 
295:     const po = await this.poRepo.findOne({
296:       where: { id, supplierId },
297:       relations: ['supplier', 'lineItems'],
298:     });
299: 
300:     if (!po || !visibleStatuses.includes(po.status)) {
301:       throw new NotFoundException('Purchase order not found');
302:     }
303:     return po;
304:   }
305: }

<content>1: import {
2:   Injectable,
3:   NotFoundException,
4:   BadRequestException,
5: } from '@nestjs/common';
6: import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
7: import { Repository, DataSource } from 'typeorm';
8: import { Receipt } from './entities/receipt.entity';
9: import { ReceiptLineItem } from './entities/receipt-line-item.entity';
10: import { PurchaseOrder } from '../purchase-orders/entities/purchase-order.entity';
11: import { PurchaseOrderLineItem } from '../purchase-orders/entities/purchase-order-line-item.entity';
12: import { ReceiptStatus } from '../common/enums/receipt-status.enum';
13: import { ReceivingEntryMode } from '../common/enums/receiving-entry-mode.enum';
14: import { VarianceReasonCode } from '../common/enums/variance-reason-code.enum';
15: import { PoStatus } from '../common/enums/po-status.enum';
16: import { AuditAction } from '../common/enums/audit-action.enum';
17: import { NotificationType } from '../common/enums/notification-type.enum';
18: import { AuditService } from '../audit/audit.service';
19: import { NotificationService } from '../notifications/notification.service';
20: import { CreateReceiptDto } from './dto/create-receipt.dto';
21: import { QueryReceiptsDto } from './dto/query-receipts.dto';
22: 
23: @Injectable()
24: export class ReceivingService {
25:   constructor(
26:     @InjectRepository(Receipt)
27:     private readonly receiptRepo: Repository<Receipt>,
28:     @InjectRepository(ReceiptLineItem)
29:     private readonly rliRepo: Repository<ReceiptLineItem>,
30:     private readonly dataSource: DataSource,
31:     private readonly auditService: AuditService,
32:     private readonly notificationService: NotificationService,
33:   ) {}
34: 
35:   private async generateReceiptNumber(): Promise<string> {
36:     const result = await this.dataSource.query(
37:       `SELECT nextval('receipt_number_seq') as seq`,
38:     );
39:     const seq = parseInt(result[0].seq, 10);
40:     const year = new Date().getFullYear();
41:     return `REC-${year}-${String(seq).padStart(5, '0')}`;
42:   }
43: 
44:   async create(userId: string, dto: CreateReceiptDto): Promise<Receipt> {
45:     const po = await this.dataSource.getRepository(PurchaseOrder).findOne({
46:       where: { id: dto.poId },
47:       relations: ['lineItems'],
48:     });
49:     if (!po) throw new NotFoundException('Purchase order not found');
50:     if (![PoStatus.ISSUED, PoStatus.PARTIALLY_RECEIVED].includes(po.status)) {
51:       throw new BadRequestException(
52:         'PO must be ISSUED or PARTIALLY_RECEIVED to receive against',
53:       );
54:     }
55: 
56:     // Build a fast lookup map: PO line item ID ΓåÆ PO line item
57:     const poLineItemMap = new Map(po.lineItems.map((li) => [li.id, li]));
58: 
59:     const receiptNumber = await this.generateReceiptNumber();
60: 
61:     const lineItems = dto.lineItems.map((li) => {
62:       // Validate the line item belongs to this PO
63:       const poLineItem = poLineItemMap.get(li.poLineItemId);
64:       if (!poLineItem) {
65:         throw new BadRequestException(
66:           `Line item ${li.poLineItemId} does not belong to PO ${dto.poId}`,
67:         );
68:       }
69: 
70:       // Derive expected quantity server-side (remaining to receive)
71:       const quantityExpected = Math.max(
72:         0,
73:         Number(poLineItem.quantity) - Number(poLineItem.quantityReceived),
74:       );
75: 
76:       // Reject over-receipt
77:       if (Number(li.quantityReceived) > quantityExpected) {
78:         throw new BadRequestException(
79:           `Received quantity ${li.quantityReceived} exceeds remaining expected quantity ${quantityExpected} for line item ${li.poLineItemId}`,
80:         );
81:       }
82: 
83:       const variance = Number(li.quantityReceived) - quantityExpected;
84:       if (variance !== 0 && (!li.varianceReasonCode || li.varianceReasonCode === VarianceReasonCode.NONE)) {
85:         throw new BadRequestException(
86:           `Variance on line item ${li.poLineItemId} requires a reason code`,
87:         );
88:       }
89:       const rli = new ReceiptLineItem();
90:       rli.poLineItemId = li.poLineItemId;
91:       rli.quantityExpected = quantityExpected;
92:       rli.quantityReceived = Number(li.quantityReceived);
93:       rli.varianceQuantity = variance;
94:       rli.varianceReasonCode = li.varianceReasonCode ?? VarianceReasonCode.NONE;
95:       rli.varianceNotes = li.varianceNotes ?? null;
96:       rli.putawayLocationId = li.putawayLocationId ?? null;
97:       return rli;
98:     });
99: 
100:     const receipt = this.receiptRepo.create({
101:       receiptNumber,
102:       poId: dto.poId,
103:       receivedBy: userId,
104:       status: ReceiptStatus.IN_PROGRESS,
105:       entryMode: dto.entryMode ?? ReceivingEntryMode.MANUAL,
106:       notes: dto.notes ?? null,
107:       lineItems,
108:     });
109: 
110:     const saved = await this.receiptRepo.save(receipt);
111: 
112:     await this.auditService.log(
113:       userId,
114:       AuditAction.RECEIPT_CREATED,
115:       'Receipt',
116:       saved.id,
117:       { receiptNumber: saved.receiptNumber, poId: dto.poId },
118:     );
119: 
120:     return this.findById(saved.id);
121:   }
122: 
123:   async complete(id: string, userId: string): Promise<Receipt> {
124:     const receipt = await this.findById(id);
125:     if (receipt.status === ReceiptStatus.COMPLETED) {
126:       throw new BadRequestException('Receipt is already completed');
127:     }
128: 
129:     let newPoStatus: PoStatus = PoStatus.PARTIALLY_RECEIVED;
130: 
131:     await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
132:       // Mark receipt completed
133:       await manager.update(Receipt, id, {
134:         status: ReceiptStatus.COMPLETED,
135:         receivedAt: new Date(),
136:       });
137: 
138:       // Accumulate quantityReceived increments per PO line item
139:       for (const rli of receipt.lineItems) {
140:         await manager
141:           .createQueryBuilder()
142:           .update(PurchaseOrderLineItem)
143:           .set({
144:             quantityReceived: () =>
145:               `"quantityReceived" + ${Number(rli.quantityReceived)}`,
146:           })
147:           .where('id = :id', { id: rli.poLineItemId })
148:           .execute();
149:       }
150: 
151:       // Re-fetch PO line items to determine new status
152:       const po = await manager.findOne(PurchaseOrder, {
153:         where: { id: receipt.poId },
154:         relations: ['lineItems'],
155:       });
156: 
157:       const allFullyReceived = po!.lineItems.every(
158:         (li) => Number(li.quantityReceived) >= Number(li.quantity),
159:       );
160:       newPoStatus = allFullyReceived
161:         ? PoStatus.FULLY_RECEIVED
162:         : PoStatus.PARTIALLY_RECEIVED;
163: 
164:       await manager.update(PurchaseOrder, receipt.poId, { status: newPoStatus });
165:     });
166: 
167:     await this.auditService.log(
168:       userId,
169:       AuditAction.RECEIPT_COMPLETED,
170:       'Receipt',
171:       id,
172:       { receiptNumber: receipt.receiptNumber, poId: receipt.poId, newPoStatus },
173:     );
174: 
175:     await this.notificationService.emit(
176:       userId,
177:       NotificationType.RECEIPT_COMPLETED,
178:       'Receipt Completed',
179:       `Receipt ${receipt.receiptNumber} has been completed. PO status is now ${newPoStatus}.`,
180:       { type: 'Receipt', id },
181:     );
182: 
183:     return this.findById(id);
184:   }
185: 
186:   async findAll(query: QueryReceiptsDto) {
187:     const page = parseInt(query.page || '1', 10);
188:     const limit = Math.min(parseInt(query.limit || '20', 10), 100);
189:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
190: 
191:     const qb = this.receiptRepo
192:       .createQueryBuilder('r')
193:       .leftJoinAndSelect('r.purchaseOrder', 'po')
194:       .leftJoinAndSelect('r.receiver', 'receiver')
195:       .leftJoinAndSelect('r.lineItems', 'lineItems')
196:       .leftJoinAndSelect('lineItems.putawayLocation', 'putawayLocation')
197:       .orderBy('r.createdAt', 'DESC')
198:       .skip(skip)
199:       .take(limit);
200: 
201:     if (query.poId) {
202:       qb.andWhere('r.poId = :poId', { poId: query.poId });
203:     }
204: 
205:     const [data, total] = await qb.getManyAndCount();
206:     return { data, meta: { page, limit, total, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit) } };
207:   }
208: 
209:   async findById(id: string): Promise<Receipt> {
210:     const receipt = await this.receiptRepo.findOne({
211:       where: { id },
212:       relations: ['purchaseOrder', 'receiver', 'lineItems', 'lineItems.putawayLocation', 'lineItems.poLineItem'],
213:     });
214:     if (!receipt) throw new NotFoundException('Receipt not found');
215:     return receipt;
216:   }
217: }

74:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Create ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
75: 
76:   async create(userId: string, dto: CreateReturnDto): Promise<ReturnAuthorization> {
77:     const policy = await this.getPolicy();
78: 
79:     const receipt = await this.receiptRepo.findOne({
80:       where: { id: dto.receiptId },
81:       relations: ['lineItems', 'lineItems.poLineItem', 'purchaseOrder'],
82:     });
83:     if (!receipt) throw new NotFoundException('Receipt not found');
84:     if (receipt.status !== ReceiptStatus.COMPLETED) {
85:       throw new BadRequestException('Can only create returns against completed receipts');
86:     }
87:     if (!receipt.receivedAt) {
88:       throw new BadRequestException('Receipt has no received date');
89:     }
90: 
91:     const now = new Date();
92:     const daysSinceReceipt = Math.floor(
93:       (now.getTime() - receipt.receivedAt.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24),
94:     );
95: 
96:     if (daysSinceReceipt > policy.returnWindowDays) {
97:       throw new BadRequestException(
98:         `Return window of ${policy.returnWindowDays} days has expired (${daysSinceReceipt} days since receipt)`,
99:       );
100:     }
101: 
102:     const deadlineDate = new Date(receipt.receivedAt.getTime());
103:     deadlineDate.setDate(deadlineDate.getDate() + policy.returnWindowDays);
104:     const returnDeadline = deadlineDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
105: 
106:     // Build line items with fee calculation
107:     const lineItems: ReturnLineItem[] = [];
108:     for (const liDto of dto.lineItems) {
109:       const receiptLi = receipt.lineItems.find((li) => li.id === liDto.receiptLineItemId);
110:       if (!receiptLi) {
111:         throw new NotFoundException(`Receipt line item ${liDto.receiptLineItemId} not found`);
112:       }
113:       if (Number(liDto.quantityReturned) > Number(receiptLi.quantityReceived)) {
114:         throw new BadRequestException(
115:           `Cannot return more than received quantity for line item ${receiptLi.id}`,
116:         );
117:       }
118: 
119:       const unitPrice = Number(receiptLi.poLineItem?.unitPrice ?? 0);
120:       const feePercent = RestockingFeeEngine.calculate(liDto.reasonCode, daysSinceReceipt, policy);
121:       const gross = Number(liDto.quantityReturned) * unitPrice;
122:       const feeAmount = parseFloat((gross * (feePercent / 100)).toFixed(2));
123:       const refundAmount = parseFloat((gross - feeAmount).toFixed(2));
124: 
125:       const rli = new ReturnLineItem();
126:       rli.receiptLineItemId = liDto.receiptLineItemId;
127:       rli.quantityReturned = Number(liDto.quantityReturned);
128:       rli.reasonCode = liDto.reasonCode;
129:       rli.reasonNotes = liDto.reasonNotes ?? null;
130:       rli.restockingFeePercent = feePercent;
131:       rli.restockingFeeAmount = feeAmount;
132:       rli.refundAmount = refundAmount;
133:       lineItems.push(rli);
134:     }
135: 
136:     const raNumber = await this.generateRaNumber();
137:     const ra = this.raRepo.create({
138:       raNumber,
139:       receiptId: dto.receiptId,
140:       poId: receipt.poId ?? null,
141:       supplierId: receipt.purchaseOrder?.supplierId ?? null,
142:       createdBy: userId,
143:       status: ReturnStatus.DRAFT,
144:       returnWindowDays: policy.returnWindowDays,
145:       returnDeadline,
146:       lineItems,
147:     });
148: 
149:     const saved = await this.raRepo.save(ra);
150: 
151:     await this.auditService.log(userId, AuditAction.RA_CREATED, 'ReturnAuthorization', saved.id, {
152:       raNumber: saved.raNumber,
153:       receiptId: dto.receiptId,
154:       daysSinceReceipt,
155:     });
156: 
157:     await this.notificationService.emit(
158:       userId,
159:       NotificationType.RETURN_CREATED,
160:       'Return Authorization Created',
161:       `Return authorization ${saved.raNumber} has been created as a draft.`,
162:       { type: 'ReturnAuthorization', id: saved.id },
163:     );
164: 
165:     return this.findById(saved.id);
166:   }
167: 
168:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Submit ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
169: 
170:   async submit(id: string, userId: string): Promise<ReturnAuthorization> {
171:     const ra = await this.findById(id);
172:     if (!SUBMITTABLE.includes(ra.status)) {
173:       throw new BadRequestException(`Cannot submit a return with status ${ra.status}`);
174:     }
175: 
176:     // Re-validate return window at submission time
177:     const policy = await this.getPolicy();
178:     const today = new Date();
179:     const deadline = new Date(ra.returnDeadline);
180:     if (today > deadline) {
181:       throw new BadRequestException('Return window has expired; this return can no longer be submitted');
182:     }
183: 
184:     await this.raRepo.update(id, { status: ReturnStatus.SUBMITTED });
185: 
186:     await this.auditService.log(userId, AuditAction.RA_SUBMITTED, 'ReturnAuthorization', id, {
187:       raNumber: ra.raNumber,
188:     });
189: 
190:     return this.findById(id);
191:   }
192: 
193:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Status update ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
194: 
195:   async updateStatus(
196:     id: string,
197:     userId: string,
198:     newStatus: ReturnStatus,
199:   ): Promise<ReturnAuthorization> {
200:     const ra = await this.findById(id);
201: 
202:     if (newStatus === ReturnStatus.CANCELLED && !CANCELLABLE.includes(ra.status)) {
203:       throw new BadRequestException(`Cannot cancel a return with status ${ra.status}`);
204:     }
205:     if (ra.status === ReturnStatus.COMPLETED || ra.status === ReturnStatus.CANCELLED) {
206:       throw new BadRequestException(`Cannot change status of a ${ra.status} return`);
207:     }
208: 
209:     await this.raRepo.update(id, { status: newStatus });
210: 
211:     const auditAction =
212:       newStatus === ReturnStatus.COMPLETED ? AuditAction.RA_COMPLETED : AuditAction.RA_STATUS_CHANGED;
213: 
214:     await this.auditService.log(userId, auditAction, 'ReturnAuthorization', id, {
215:       raNumber: ra.raNumber,
216:       previousStatus: ra.status,
217:       newStatus,
218:     });
219: 
220:     if (newStatus === ReturnStatus.COMPLETED) {
221:       const totalRefund = ra.lineItems.reduce((s, li) => s + Number(li.refundAmount), 0);
222:       await this.fundsLedger.recordRefund(ra.supplierId ?? '', totalRefund, id, userId);
223:     }
224: 
225:     if (
226:       ra.createdBy &&
227:       (newStatus === ReturnStatus.APPROVED ||
228:         newStatus === ReturnStatus.COMPLETED ||
229:         newStatus === ReturnStatus.CANCELLED)
230:     ) {
231:       const statusLabels: Record<string, string> = {
232:         [ReturnStatus.APPROVED]: 'approved',
233:         [ReturnStatus.COMPLETED]: 'completed',
234:         [ReturnStatus.CANCELLED]: 'cancelled',
235:       };
236:       await this.notificationService.emit(
237:         ra.createdBy,
238:         NotificationType.REVIEW_OUTCOME,
239:         `Return ${statusLabels[newStatus] ?? newStatus}`,
240:         `Return authorization ${ra.raNumber} has been ${statusLabels[newStatus] ?? newStatus}.`,
241:         { type: 'ReturnAuthorization', id },
242:       );
243:     }
244: 
245:     return this.findById(id);
246:   }
247: 
248:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Queries ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
249: 
250:   async findAll(query: QueryReturnsDto) {
251:     const page = parseInt(query.page || '1', 10);
252:     const limit = Math.min(parseInt(query.limit || '20', 10), 100);
253:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
254: 
255:     const qb = this.raRepo
256:       .createQueryBuilder('ra')
257:       .leftJoinAndSelect('ra.supplier', 'supplier')
258:       .leftJoinAndSelect('ra.receipt', 'receipt')
259:       .leftJoinAndSelect('ra.creator', 'creator')
260:       .leftJoinAndSelect('ra.lineItems', 'lineItems')
261:       .orderBy('ra.createdAt', 'DESC')
262:       .skip(skip)
263:       .take(limit);
264: 
265:     if (query.status) qb.andWhere('ra.status = :status', { status: query.status });
266:     if (query.supplierId) qb.andWhere('ra.supplierId = :supplierId', { supplierId: query.supplierId });
267:     if (query.dateFrom && query.dateTo) {
268:       qb.andWhere('ra.createdAt BETWEEN :from AND :to', {
269:         from: new Date(query.dateFrom),
270:         to: new Date(query.dateTo),
271:       });
272:     } else if (query.dateFrom) {
273:       qb.andWhere('ra.createdAt >= :from', { from: new Date(query.dateFrom) });
274:     } else if (query.dateTo) {
275:       qb.andWhere('ra.createdAt <= :to', { to: new Date(query.dateTo) });
276:     }
277: 
278:     const [data, total] = await qb.getManyAndCount();
279:     return { data, meta: { page, limit, total, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit) } };
280:   }
281: 
282:   async findById(id: string): Promise<ReturnAuthorization> {
283:     const ra = await this.raRepo.findOne({
284:       where: { id },
285:       relations: [
286:         'supplier',
287:         'receipt',
288:         'purchaseOrder',
289:         'creator',
290:         'lineItems',
291:         'lineItems.receiptLineItem',
292:         'lineItems.receiptLineItem.poLineItem',
293:       ],
294:     });
295:     if (!ra) throw new NotFoundException('Return authorization not found');
296:     return ra;
297:   }
298: 
299:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Supplier portal ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
300: 
301:   async findForSupplier(supplierId: string, query: QueryReturnsDto) {
302:     const page = parseInt(query.page || '1', 10);
303:     const limit = Math.min(parseInt(query.limit || '20', 10), 50);
304:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
305: 
306:     const qb = this.raRepo
307:       .createQueryBuilder('ra')
308:       .leftJoinAndSelect('ra.receipt', 'receipt')
309:       .leftJoinAndSelect('ra.lineItems', 'lineItems')
310:       .where('ra.supplierId = :supplierId', { supplierId })
311:       .andWhere('ra.status != :draft', { draft: ReturnStatus.DRAFT })
312:       .orderBy('ra.createdAt', 'DESC')
313:       .skip(skip)
314:       .take(limit);
315: 
316:     if (query.status && query.status !== ReturnStatus.DRAFT) {
317:       qb.andWhere('ra.status = :status', { status: query.status });
318:     }
319: 
320:     const [data, total] = await qb.getManyAndCount();
321:     return { data, meta: { page, limit, total, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit) } };
322:   }
323: 
324:   async findByIdForSupplier(id: string, supplierId: string): Promise<ReturnAuthorization> {
325:     const ra = await this.raRepo.findOne({
326:       where: { id, supplierId },
327:       relations: ['receipt', 'lineItems', 'lineItems.receiptLineItem', 'lineItems.receiptLineItem.poLineItem'],
328:     });
329:     if (!ra || ra.status === ReturnStatus.DRAFT) {
330:       throw new NotFoundException('Return authorization not found');
331:     }
332:     return ra;
333:   }
334: }

21: @Controller('receipts')
22: export class ReceiptsController {

<content>1: import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
2: import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
3: import { Repository, DataSource, EntityManager } from 'typeorm';
4: import { Notification } from './entities/notification.entity';
5: import { NotificationPreference } from './entities/notification-preference.entity';
6: import { NotificationThrottle } from './entities/notification-throttle.entity';
7: import { NotificationType } from '../common/enums/notification-type.enum';
8: 
9: const THROTTLE_LIMIT = 20;
10: const THROTTLE_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 hour
11: 
12: export interface NotificationReference {
13:   type: string;
14:   id: string;
15: }
16: 
17: @Injectable()
18: export class NotificationService {
19:   private readonly logger = new Logger(NotificationService.name);
20: 
21:   constructor(
22:     @InjectRepository(Notification)
23:     private readonly notifRepo: Repository<Notification>,
24:     @InjectRepository(NotificationPreference)
25:     private readonly prefRepo: Repository<NotificationPreference>,
26:     @InjectRepository(NotificationThrottle)
27:     private readonly throttleRepo: Repository<NotificationThrottle>,
28:     private readonly dataSource: DataSource,
29:   ) {}
30: 
31:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Emit ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
32: 
33:   async emit(
34:     recipientId: string,
35:     type: NotificationType,
36:     title: string,
37:     message: string,
38:     reference?: NotificationReference,
39:   ): Promise<void> {
40:     // 1. Check preference (user may have disabled this type)
41:     const pref = await this.prefRepo.findOne({ where: { userId: recipientId, type } });
42:     if (pref && !pref.isEnabled) {
43:       this.logger.debug(`Notification suppressed by preference: ${type} ΓåÆ ${recipientId}`);
44:       return;
45:     }
46: 
47:     // 2. Count delivered notifications in rolling 60-minute window
48:     const windowStart = new Date(Date.now() - THROTTLE_WINDOW_MS);
49:     const recentCount = await this.notifRepo
50:       .createQueryBuilder('n')
51:       .where('n.recipientId = :recipientId', { recipientId })
52:       .andWhere('n.isQueued = false')
53:       .andWhere('n.createdAt >= :windowStart', { windowStart })
54:       .getCount();
55: 
56:     let isQueued = false;
57:     if (recentCount >= THROTTLE_LIMIT) {
58:       isQueued = true;
59:       // Log throttle event
60:       await this.throttleRepo.save({ userId: recipientId, type });
61:       this.logger.warn(
62:         `Throttled notification for user ${recipientId}: type=${type}, recentCount=${recentCount}`,
63:       );
64:     }
65: 
66:     // 3. Save notification
67:     await this.notifRepo.save({
68:       recipientId,
69:       type,
70:       title,
71:       message,
72:       referenceType: reference?.type ?? null,
73:       referenceId: reference?.id ?? null,
74:       isRead: false,
75:       isQueued,
76:     });
77: 
78:     // 4. If not throttled, deliver any queued notifications that fit in the new window
79:     if (!isQueued) {
80:       await this.deliverQueued(recipientId, recentCount + 1);
81:     }
82:   }
83: 
84:   /**
85:    * Drain all queued notifications for all users.
86:    *
87:    * When called by the scheduler pass an EntityManager so every read and write
88:    * in this method participates in the same transaction.  The transaction is
89:    * opened by the scheduler, not here, so a failure rolls back all deliveries
90:    * from that attempt atomically, leaving no partial state for the retry.
91:    *
92:    * When called without a manager (e.g. from tests or ad-hoc tooling) the
93:    * method falls back to the injected repository with auto-commit semantics.
94:    */
95:   async drainQueue(manager?: EntityManager): Promise<void> {
96:     const notifRepo: Repository<Notification> = manager
97:       ? manager.getRepository(Notification)
98:       : this.notifRepo;
99: 
100:     const users: Array<{ recipientId: string }> = await notifRepo
101:       .createQueryBuilder('n')
102:       .select('DISTINCT n.recipientId', 'recipientId')
103:       .where('n.isQueued = true')
104:       .getRawMany();
105: 
106:     for (const { recipientId } of users) {
107:       const windowStart = new Date(Date.now() - THROTTLE_WINDOW_MS);
108:       const currentCount = await notifRepo
109:         .createQueryBuilder('n')
110:         .where('n.recipientId = :recipientId', { recipientId })
111:         .andWhere('n.isQueued = false')
112:         .andWhere('n.createdAt >= :windowStart', { windowStart })
113:         .getCount();
114: 
115:       await this.deliverQueued(recipientId, currentCount, notifRepo);
116:     }
117:   }
118: 
119:   // Promote oldest queued notifications up to available capacity.
120:   // Accepts the repository to use so callers inside a transaction share the
121:   // same EntityManager-scoped repo.
122:   private async deliverQueued(
123:     recipientId: string,
124:     currentCount: number,
125:     notifRepo: Repository<Notification> = this.notifRepo,
126:   ): Promise<void> {
127:     const capacity = THROTTLE_LIMIT - currentCount;
128:     if (capacity <= 0) return;
129: 
130:     const queued = await notifRepo.find({
131:       where: { recipientId, isQueued: true },
132:       order: { createdAt: 'ASC' },
133:       take: capacity,
134:     });
135: 
136:     if (queued.length === 0) return;
137: 
138:     await notifRepo
139:       .createQueryBuilder()
140:       .update(Notification)
141:       .set({ isQueued: false })
142:       .whereInIds(queued.map((n) => n.id))
143:       .execute();
144: 
145:     this.logger.log(`Delivered ${queued.length} queued notification(s) for user ${recipientId}`);
146:   }
147: 
148:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Queries ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
149: 
150:   async findForUser(
151:     userId: string,
152:     opts: { unreadOnly?: boolean; page?: number; limit?: number },
153:   ) {
154:     const page = opts.page ?? 1;
155:     const limit = Math.min(opts.limit ?? 20, 100);
156:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
157: 
158:     const qb = this.notifRepo
159:       .createQueryBuilder('n')
160:       .where('n.recipientId = :userId', { userId })
161:       .andWhere('n.isQueued = false')
162:       .orderBy('n.createdAt', 'DESC')
163:       .skip(skip)
164:       .take(limit);
165: 
166:     if (opts.unreadOnly) {
167:       qb.andWhere('n.isRead = false');
168:     }
169: 
170:     const [data, total] = await qb.getManyAndCount();
171:     return { data, meta: { page, limit, total, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit) } };
172:   }
173: 
174:   async getUnreadCount(userId: string): Promise<number> {
175:     return this.notifRepo.count({
176:       where: { recipientId: userId, isRead: false, isQueued: false },
177:     });
178:   }
179: 
180:   async markRead(id: string, userId: string): Promise<Notification> {
181:     const n = await this.notifRepo.findOne({ where: { id, recipientId: userId } });
182:     if (!n) throw new Error('Notification not found');
183:     if (!n.isRead) {
184:       await this.notifRepo.update(id, { isRead: true, readAt: new Date() });
185:     }
186:     return this.notifRepo.findOneOrFail({ where: { id } });
187:   }
188: 
189:   async markAllRead(userId: string): Promise<void> {
190:     await this.notifRepo
191:       .createQueryBuilder()
192:       .update(Notification)
193:       .set({ isRead: true, readAt: new Date() })
194:       .where('"recipientId" = :userId', { userId })
195:       .andWhere('"isRead" = false')
196:       .execute();
197:   }
198: 
199:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Preferences ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
200: 
201:   async getPreferences(userId: string): Promise<Array<{ type: NotificationType; isEnabled: boolean }>> {
202:     const saved = await this.prefRepo.find({ where: { userId } });
203:     const savedMap = new Map(saved.map((p) => [p.type, p.isEnabled]));
204: 
205:     return Object.values(NotificationType).map((type) => ({
206:       type,
207:       isEnabled: savedMap.has(type) ? (savedMap.get(type) as boolean) : true,
208:     }));
209:   }
210: 
211:   async updatePreferences(
212:     userId: string,
213:     updates: Array<{ type: NotificationType; isEnabled: boolean }>,
214:   ): Promise<Array<{ type: NotificationType; isEnabled: boolean }>> {
215:     for (const upd of updates) {
216:       await this.prefRepo
217:         .createQueryBuilder()
218:         .insert()
219:         .into(NotificationPreference)
220:         .values({ userId, type: upd.type, isEnabled: upd.isEnabled })
221:         .orUpdate(['isEnabled'], ['userId', 'type'])
222:         .execute();
223:     }
224:     return this.getPreferences(userId);
225:   }
226: }

<path>C:\Users\betea\Documents\projects\Claude task\Task-1\repo\server\src\knowledge-base\knowledge-base.service.ts</path>

<content>1: import {
2:   Injectable,
3:   NotFoundException,
4:   ForbiddenException,
5:   ConflictException,
6: } from '@nestjs/common';
7: import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
8: import { Repository, DataSource } from 'typeorm';
9: import { Article } from './entities/article.entity';
10: import { ArticleVersion } from './entities/article-version.entity';
11: import { UserFavorite } from './entities/user-favorite.entity';
12: import { ArticleStatus } from '../common/enums/article-status.enum';
13: import { ArticleCategory } from '../common/enums/article-category.enum';
14: import { Role } from '../common/enums/role.enum';
15: import { AuditAction } from '../common/enums/audit-action.enum';
16: import { NotificationType } from '../common/enums/notification-type.enum';
17: import { AuditService } from '../audit/audit.service';
18: import { NotificationService } from '../notifications/notification.service';
19: import { DataQualityService } from '../data-quality/data-quality.service';
20: import { CreateArticleDto } from './dto/create-article.dto';
21: import { UpdateArticleDto, PromoteArticleDto } from './dto/update-article.dto';
22: import { QueryArticlesDto } from './dto/query-articles.dto';
23: 
24: @Injectable()
25: export class KnowledgeBaseService {
26:   constructor(
27:     @InjectRepository(Article)
28:     private readonly articleRepo: Repository<Article>,
29:     @InjectRepository(ArticleVersion)
30:     private readonly versionRepo: Repository<ArticleVersion>,
31:     @InjectRepository(UserFavorite)
32:     private readonly favoriteRepo: Repository<UserFavorite>,
33:     private readonly dataSource: DataSource,
34:     private readonly auditService: AuditService,
35:     private readonly notificationService: NotificationService,
36:     private readonly dataQuality: DataQualityService,
37:   ) {}
38: 
39:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Slug generation ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
40: 
41:   private async generateUniqueSlug(title: string): Promise<string> {
42:     const base = title
43:       .toLowerCase()
44:       .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s-]/g, '')
45:       .replace(/\s+/g, '-')
46:       .replace(/-+/g, '-')
47:       .trim()
48:       .slice(0, 80);
49: 
50:     let slug = base || 'article';
51:     let attempt = 0;
52:     while (await this.articleRepo.findOne({ where: { slug } })) {
53:       slug = `${base}-${++attempt}`;
54:     }
55:     return slug;
56:   }
57: 
58:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Visibility helpers ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
59: 
60:   private buildVisibilityCondition(
61:     qb: ReturnType<typeof this.articleRepo.createQueryBuilder>,
62:     userId: string,
63:     userRole: string,
64:   ) {
65:     if (userRole === Role.ADMINISTRATOR) {
66:       // Admin sees everything except ARCHIVED (still accessible by ID)
67:       qb.andWhere('a.status != :archived', { archived: ArticleStatus.ARCHIVED });
68:       return;
69:     }
70:     if (userRole === Role.PLANT_CARE_SPECIALIST) {
71:       qb.andWhere(
72:         '(a.status = :storewide OR a.status = :specialist OR a.status = :draft)',
73:         {
74:           storewide: ArticleStatus.STOREWIDE,
75:           specialist: ArticleStatus.SPECIALIST_ONLY,
76:           draft: ArticleStatus.DRAFT,
77:         },
78:       );
79:       return;
80:     }
81:     // All other roles: STOREWIDE + own DRAFTs
82:     qb.andWhere(
83:       '(a.status = :storewide OR (a.status = :draft AND a.authorId = :uid))',
84:       { storewide: ArticleStatus.STOREWIDE, draft: ArticleStatus.DRAFT, uid: userId },
85:     );
86:   }
87: 
88:   private canViewArticle(article: Article, userId: string, userRole: string): boolean {
89:     if (userRole === Role.ADMINISTRATOR) return true;
90:     if (article.status === ArticleStatus.ARCHIVED) return false;
91:     if (article.status === ArticleStatus.STOREWIDE) return true;
92:     if (article.status === ArticleStatus.SPECIALIST_ONLY && userRole === Role.PLANT_CARE_SPECIALIST)
93:       return true;
94:     if (article.status === ArticleStatus.DRAFT) {
95:       // Specialists can view all drafts (phased-release collaboration);
96:       // other roles can only view their own drafts.
97:       return userRole === Role.PLANT_CARE_SPECIALIST || article.authorId === userId;
98:     }
99:     return false;
100:   }
101: 
102:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ CRUD ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
103: 
104:   async create(userId: string, dto: CreateArticleDto): Promise<Article> {
105:     const slug = await this.generateUniqueSlug(dto.title);
106: 
107:     const article = await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
108:       const a = manager.create(Article, {
109:         title: dto.title,
110:         slug,
111:         category: dto.category ?? ArticleCategory.GENERAL,
112:         content: dto.content,
113:         tags: dto.tags ?? [],
114:         status: ArticleStatus.DRAFT,
115:         authorId: userId,
116:         currentVersionId: null,
117:       });
118:       const saved = await manager.save(Article, a);
119: 
120:       // Create initial version
121:       const v = manager.create(ArticleVersion, {
122:         articleId: saved.id,
123:         versionNumber: 1,
124:         title: dto.title,
125:         content: dto.content,
126:         changeSummary: dto.changeSummary ?? 'Initial version',
127:         createdBy: userId,
128:       });
129:       const savedV = await manager.save(ArticleVersion, v);
130:       await manager.update(Article, saved.id, { currentVersionId: savedV.id });
131:       saved.currentVersionId = savedV.id;
132:       return saved;
133:     });
134: 
135:     const fingerprint = this.dataQuality.generateFingerprint([article.title]);
136:     await this.articleRepo.update(article.id, { fingerprint });
137:     this.dataQuality.checkForDuplicates('Article', article.id, fingerprint).catch(() => undefined);
138: 
139:     await this.auditService.log(userId, AuditAction.ARTICLE_CREATED, 'Article', article.id, {
140:       title: article.title,
141:       slug: article.slug,
142:     });
143: 
144:     return this.findById(article.id, userId, Role.ADMINISTRATOR);
145:   }
146: 
147:   async update(id: string, userId: string, userRole: string, dto: UpdateArticleDto): Promise<Article> {
148:     const article = await this.articleRepo.findOne({ where: { id } });
149:     if (!article) throw new NotFoundException('Article not found');
150:     if (article.status === ArticleStatus.ARCHIVED)
151:       throw new ForbiddenException('Cannot edit an archived article');
152: 
153:     // Specialists may only edit their own draft articles; promotion stays admin-controlled.
154:     if (userRole === Role.PLANT_CARE_SPECIALIST) {
155:       if (article.authorId !== userId)
156:         throw new ForbiddenException('Specialists may only edit their own articles');
157:       if (article.status !== ArticleStatus.DRAFT)
158:         throw new ForbiddenException('Specialists may only edit draft articles');
159:     }
160: 
161:     await this.dataSource.transaction(async (manager) => {
162:       if (dto.title !== undefined) article.title = dto.title;
163:       if (dto.category !== undefined) article.category = dto.category;
164:       if (dto.content !== undefined) article.content = dto.content;
165:       if (dto.tags !== undefined) article.tags = dto.tags;
166: 
167:       await manager.save(Article, article);
168: 
169:       // Get next version number
170:       const maxResult = await manager
171:         .createQueryBuilder()
172:         .select('MAX(av."versionNumber")', 'max')
173:         .from(ArticleVersion, 'av')
174:         .where('av."articleId" = :id', { id })
175:         .getRawOne<{ max: string }>();
176:       const nextVersion = (parseInt(maxResult?.max ?? '0', 10) || 0) + 1;
177: 
178:       const v = manager.create(ArticleVersion, {
179:         articleId: id,
180:         versionNumber: nextVersion,
181:         title: article.title,
182:         content: article.content,
183:         changeSummary: dto.changeSummary ?? null,
184:         createdBy: userId,
185:       });
186:       const savedV = await manager.save(ArticleVersion, v);
187:       await manager.update(Article, id, { currentVersionId: savedV.id });
188:     });
189: 
190:     const fingerprint = this.dataQuality.generateFingerprint([article.title]);
191:     await this.articleRepo.update(id, { fingerprint });
192:     this.dataQuality.checkForDuplicates('Article', id, fingerprint).catch(() => undefined);
193: 
194:     await this.auditService.log(userId, AuditAction.ARTICLE_UPDATED, 'Article', id, {
195:       title: article.title,
196:     });
197: 
198:     return this.findById(id, userId, userRole);
199:   }

201:   async promote(id: string, userId: string, dto: PromoteArticleDto): Promise<Article> {
202:     const article = await this.articleRepo.findOne({ where: { id } });
203:     if (!article) throw new NotFoundException('Article not found');
204: 
205:     const prevStatus = article.status;
206:     await this.articleRepo.update(id, { status: dto.status });
207: 
208:     const action =
209:       dto.status === ArticleStatus.ARCHIVED
210:         ? AuditAction.ARTICLE_ARCHIVED
211:         : AuditAction.ARTICLE_PROMOTED;
212: 
213:     await this.auditService.log(userId, action, 'Article', id, {
214:       title: article.title,
215:       previousStatus: prevStatus,
216:       newStatus: dto.status,
217:     });
218: 
219:     if (
220:       article.authorId &&
221:       (dto.status === ArticleStatus.STOREWIDE || dto.status === ArticleStatus.SPECIALIST_ONLY)
222:     ) {
223:       const audience =
224:         dto.status === ArticleStatus.STOREWIDE ? 'all staff' : 'plant care specialists';
225:       await this.notificationService.emit(
226:         article.authorId,
227:         NotificationType.ARTICLE_PUBLISHED,
228:         'Article Published',
229:         `Your article "${article.title}" has been published and is now visible to ${audience}.`,
230:         { type: 'Article', id },
231:       );
232:     }
233: 
234:     return this.findById(id, userId, Role.ADMINISTRATOR);
235:   }
236: 
237:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Queries ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
238: 
239:   async findAll(userId: string, userRole: string, query: QueryArticlesDto) {
240:     const page = parseInt(query.page || '1', 10);
241:     const limit = Math.min(parseInt(query.limit || '20', 10), 100);
242:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
243: 
244:     const qb = this.articleRepo
245:       .createQueryBuilder('a')
246:       .leftJoinAndSelect('a.author', 'author')
247:       .orderBy('a.updatedAt', 'DESC')
248:       .skip(skip)
249:       .take(limit);
250: 
251:     this.buildVisibilityCondition(qb, userId, userRole);
252: 
253:     if (query.search) {
254:       qb.andWhere(
255:         '(a.title ILIKE :search OR a.content ILIKE :search)',
256:         { search: `%${query.search}%` },
257:       );
258:     }
259:     if (query.category) qb.andWhere('a.category = :category', { category: query.category });
260:     if (query.status && userRole === Role.ADMINISTRATOR)
261:       qb.andWhere('a.status = :status', { status: query.status });
262:     if (query.tag)
263:       qb.andWhere(':tag = ANY(a.tags)', { tag: query.tag });
264: 
265:     const [data, total] = await qb.getManyAndCount();
266:     return { data, meta: { page, limit, total, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit) } };
267:   }

269:   async findById(id: string, userId: string, userRole: string): Promise<Article> {
270:     const article = await this.articleRepo.findOne({
271:       where: { id },
272:       relations: ['author'],
273:     });
274:     if (!article) throw new NotFoundException('Article not found');
275:     if (!this.canViewArticle(article, userId, userRole)) {
276:       throw new NotFoundException('Article not found');
277:     }
278:     return article;

283:     if (!article) throw new NotFoundException('Article not found');
284:     if (!this.canViewArticle(article, userId, userRole)) {
285:       throw new NotFoundException('Article not found');
286:     }

290:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Versions ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
291: 
292:   async getVersions(articleId: string, userId: string, userRole: string) {
293:     await this.findById(articleId, userId, userRole); // visibility check
294:     return this.versionRepo.find({
295:       where: { articleId },
296:       order: { versionNumber: 'DESC' },
297:       relations: ['creator'],

310:       relations: ['creator'],
311:     });
312:     if (!version) throw new NotFoundException('Version not found');

318:   async addFavorite(userId: string, articleId: string): Promise<void> {
319:     const article = await this.articleRepo.findOne({ where: { id: articleId } });
320:     if (!article) throw new NotFoundException('Article not found');
321:     const existing = await this.favoriteRepo.findOne({ where: { userId, articleId } });
322:     if (existing) return; // idempotent
323:     await this.favoriteRepo.save({ userId, articleId });

<content>1: import { Injectable, NotFoundException, ConflictException } from '@nestjs/common';
2: import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
3: import { Repository, DataSource } from 'typeorm';
4: import { SearchSynonym } from './entities/search-synonym.entity';
5: import { SearchHistory } from './entities/search-history.entity';
6: import { Article } from '../knowledge-base/entities/article.entity';
7: import { ArticleStatus } from '../common/enums/article-status.enum';
8: import { Role } from '../common/enums/role.enum';
9: import { CreateSynonymDto } from './dto/create-synonym.dto';
10: import { UpdateSynonymDto } from './dto/update-synonym.dto';
11: 
12: export interface SearchResult {
13:   id: string;
14:   title: string;
15:   slug: string;
16:   category: string;
17:   status: string;
18:   tags: string[];
19:   author: { id: string; username: string } | null;
20:   headline: string;
21:   rank: number;
22:   updatedAt: Date;
23: }
24: 
25: export interface SimilarArticle {
26:   id: string;
27:   title: string;
28:   slug: string;
29:   category: string;
30:   status: string;
31:   tags: string[];
32:   score: number;
33: }
34: 
35: @Injectable()
36: export class SearchService {
37:   constructor(
38:     @InjectRepository(SearchSynonym)
39:     private readonly synonymRepo: Repository<SearchSynonym>,
40:     @InjectRepository(SearchHistory)
41:     private readonly historyRepo: Repository<SearchHistory>,
42:     @InjectRepository(Article)
43:     private readonly articleRepo: Repository<Article>,
44:     private readonly dataSource: DataSource,
45:   ) {}
46: 
47:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Synonym expansion ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
48: 
49:   private async expandQuery(rawQuery: string): Promise<string[]> {
50:     const terms = rawQuery
51:       .toLowerCase()
52:       .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ')
53:       .split(/\s+/)
54:       .filter(Boolean);
55: 
56:     const expanded = new Set<string>(terms);
57:     if (terms.length === 0) return [];
58: 
59:     // Forward lookup: term ΓåÆ synonyms
60:     const forward = await this.synonymRepo
61:       .createQueryBuilder('s')
62:       .where('LOWER(s.term) = ANY(:terms)', { terms })
63:       .getMany();
64: 
65:     for (const row of forward) {
66:       row.synonyms.forEach((syn) =>
67:         syn.toLowerCase().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).forEach((t) => expanded.add(t)),
68:       );
69:     }
70: 
71:     // Reverse lookup: synonym ΓåÆ term (and all its synonyms)
72:     const reverse = await this.synonymRepo
73:       .createQueryBuilder('s')
74:       .where(
75:         `EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(s.synonyms) syn WHERE LOWER(syn) = ANY(:terms))`,
76:         { terms },
77:       )
78:       .getMany();
79: 
80:     for (const row of reverse) {
81:       expanded.add(row.term.toLowerCase());
82:       row.synonyms.forEach((syn) =>
83:         syn.toLowerCase().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).forEach((t) => expanded.add(t)),
84:       );
85:     }
86: 
87:     return Array.from(expanded);
88:   }
89: 
90:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Search ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
91: 
92:   async search(
93:     userId: string,
94:     userRole: string,
95:     q: string,
96:     category?: string,
97:     tags?: string,
98:   ): Promise<{ data: SearchResult[]; total: number; expandedTerms: string[] }> {
99:     const trimmed = q?.trim() ?? '';
100:     if (!trimmed) return { data: [], total: 0, expandedTerms: [] };
101: 
102:     const expandedTerms = await this.expandQuery(trimmed);
103:     if (expandedTerms.length === 0) return { data: [], total: 0, expandedTerms: [] };
104: 
105:     // tsquery: each term with prefix matching, OR-combined
106:     const tsquery = expandedTerms.map((t) => `${t}:*`).join(' | ');
107: 
108:     const values: unknown[] = [tsquery]; // $1
109:     let idx = 2;
110: 
111:     // Visibility clause
112:     let visibilitySql: string;
113:     if (userRole === Role.ADMINISTRATOR) {
114:       visibilitySql = `a.status != $${idx++}`;
115:       values.push(ArticleStatus.ARCHIVED);
116:     } else if (userRole === Role.PLANT_CARE_SPECIALIST) {
117:       visibilitySql = `(a.status = $${idx++} OR a.status = $${idx++} OR a.status = $${idx++})`;
118:       values.push(ArticleStatus.STOREWIDE, ArticleStatus.SPECIALIST_ONLY, ArticleStatus.DRAFT);
119:     } else {
120:       visibilitySql = `(a.status = $${idx++} OR (a.status = $${idx++} AND a."authorId" = $${idx++}))`;
121:       values.push(ArticleStatus.STOREWIDE, ArticleStatus.DRAFT, userId);
122:     }
123: 
124:     let sql = `
125:       SELECT
126:         a.id,
127:         a.title,
128:         a.slug,
129:         a.category,
130:         a.status,
131:         a.tags,
132:         a."updatedAt",
133:         a."authorId",
134:         u.username AS "authorUsername",
135:         ts_rank(a.search_vector, to_tsquery('english', $1)) AS rank,
136:         ts_headline('english', a.title || ' ' || a.content,
137:           to_tsquery('english', $1),
138:           'MaxWords=30, MinWords=10, StartSel=<mark>, StopSel=</mark>'
139:         ) AS headline
140:       FROM articles a
141:       LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = a."authorId"
142:       WHERE ${visibilitySql}
143:         AND a.search_vector @@ to_tsquery('english', $1)
144:     `;
145: 
146:     if (category) {
147:       sql += ` AND a.category = $${idx++}`;
148:       values.push(category);
149:     }
150: 
151:     if (tags) {
152:       sql += ` AND $${idx++} = ANY(a.tags)`;
153:       values.push(tags);
154:     }
155: 
156:     sql += ` ORDER BY rank DESC, a."updatedAt" DESC LIMIT 50`;
157: 
158:     const rows: Record<string, unknown>[] = await this.dataSource.query(sql, values);
159: 
160:     const data: SearchResult[] = rows.map((r) => ({
161:       id: r['id'] as string,
162:       title: r['title'] as string,
163:       slug: r['slug'] as string,
164:       category: r['category'] as string,
165:       status: r['status'] as string,
166:       tags: r['tags'] as string[],
167:       author: r['authorId']
168:         ? {
169:             id: r['authorId'] as string,
170:             username: (r['authorUsername'] as string) ?? '',
171:           }
172:         : null,
173:       headline: r['headline'] as string,
174:       rank: parseFloat(r['rank'] as string),
175:       updatedAt: r['updatedAt'] as Date,
176:     }));
177: 
178:     // Save history non-blocking
179:     this.saveHistory(userId, trimmed, data.length).catch(() => undefined);
180: 
181:     return { data, total: data.length, expandedTerms };
182:   }
183: 
184:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Similar articles ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
185: 
186:   async findSimilar(
187:     articleId: string,
188:     userId: string,
189:     userRole: string,
190:   ): Promise<SimilarArticle[]> {
191:     const article = await this.articleRepo.findOne({ where: { id: articleId } });
192:     if (!article) throw new NotFoundException('Article not found');
193: 
194:     let visibilitySql: string;
195:     if (userRole === Role.ADMINISTRATOR) {
196:       visibilitySql = `a.status != '${ArticleStatus.ARCHIVED}'`;
197:     } else if (userRole === Role.PLANT_CARE_SPECIALIST) {
198:       visibilitySql = `a.status IN ('${ArticleStatus.STOREWIDE}','${ArticleStatus.SPECIALIST_ONLY}','${ArticleStatus.DRAFT}')`;
199:     } else {
200:       visibilitySql = `a.status = '${ArticleStatus.STOREWIDE}'`;
201:     }
202: 
203:     const rows: Record<string, unknown>[] = await this.dataSource.query(
204:       `
205:       SELECT
206:         a.id,
207:         a.title,
208:         a.slug,
209:         a.category,
210:         a.status,
211:         a.tags,
212:         (
213:           similarity(a.title, $1) * 2.0 +
214:           (
215:             SELECT count(*)::float
216:             FROM unnest(a.tags) t
217:             WHERE t = ANY($2::text[])
218:           ) * 1.5
219:         ) AS score
220:       FROM articles a
221:       WHERE a.id != $3
222:         AND ${visibilitySql}
223:         AND (
224:           similarity(a.title, $1) > 0.1
225:           OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM unnest(a.tags) t WHERE t = ANY($2::text[]))
226:         )
227:       ORDER BY score DESC
228:       LIMIT 5
229:       `,
230:       [article.title, article.tags, articleId],
231:     );
232: 
233:     return rows.map((r) => ({
234:       id: r['id'] as string,
235:       title: r['title'] as string,
236:       slug: r['slug'] as string,
237:       category: r['category'] as string,
238:       status: r['status'] as string,
239:       tags: r['tags'] as string[],
240:       score: parseFloat(r['score'] as string),
241:     }));
242:   }
243: 
244:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Search history ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
245: 
246:   private async saveHistory(userId: string, query: string, resultCount: number): Promise<void> {
247:     await this.historyRepo.save({ userId, query, resultCount });
248:     // Prune to last 50
249:     await this.dataSource.query(
250:       `DELETE FROM search_history
251:        WHERE "userId" = $1
252:          AND id NOT IN (
253:            SELECT id FROM search_history
254:            WHERE "userId" = $1
255:            ORDER BY "searchedAt" DESC
256:            LIMIT 50
257:          )`,
258:       [userId],
259:     );
260:   }
261: 
262:   async getHistory(userId: string, q?: string): Promise<SearchHistory[]> {
263:     const qb = this.historyRepo
264:       .createQueryBuilder('h')
265:       .where('h.userId = :userId', { userId })
266:       .orderBy('h.searchedAt', 'DESC')
267:       .limit(50);
268: 
269:     if (q) {
270:       qb.andWhere('h.query ILIKE :q', { q: `${q}%` });
271:     }
272: 
273:     return qb.getMany();
274:   }

276:   // ΓöÇΓöÇ Synonyms CRUD ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ
277: 
278:   async findAllSynonyms(): Promise<SearchSynonym[]> {
279:     return this.synonymRepo.find({ order: { term: 'ASC' } });
280:   }
281: 
282:   async findSynonym(id: string): Promise<SearchSynonym> {
283:     const s = await this.synonymRepo.findOne({ where: { id } });
284:     if (!s) throw new NotFoundException('Synonym not found');
285:     return s;
286:   }
287: 
288:   async createSynonym(dto: CreateSynonymDto): Promise<SearchSynonym> {
289:     const existing = await this.synonymRepo.findOne({
290:       where: { term: dto.term.toLowerCase() },
291:     });
292:     if (existing) throw new ConflictException(`Synonym for "${dto.term}" already exists`);
293:     return this.synonymRepo.save({
294:       term: dto.term.toLowerCase(),
295:       synonyms: dto.synonyms.map((s) => s.toLowerCase()),
296:     });
297:   }
298: 
299:   async updateSynonym(id: string, dto: UpdateSynonymDto): Promise<SearchSynonym> {
300:     const s = await this.findSynonym(id);
301:     if (dto.term !== undefined) s.term = dto.term.toLowerCase();
302:     if (dto.synonyms !== undefined) s.synonyms = dto.synonyms.map((v) => v.toLowerCase());
303:     return this.synonymRepo.save(s);
304:   }
305: 
306:   async deleteSynonym(id: string): Promise<void> {
307:     await this.findSynonym(id);
308:     await this.synonymRepo.delete(id);
309:   }

<content>1: import { Injectable, Logger, NotFoundException, BadRequestException } from '@nestjs/common';
2: import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
